creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178685
devel/py-xdg: limit to use python2 only

devel/py-xdg: limit to use python2 only, for python3 already exist devel/py3-xdg port.
It's unbreak some depended ports like textproc/ibus, which also limited to python2, when python3 sets as default
